dialogue.line: I can't believe I finally have the chance to meet your dad!
If I do well... than this... this could be it! My one-way ticket into the big league!
Umm, you said he books shows, gets rappers and singers contracts and labels n' all that fun stuff in-between right?
So if he likes you, then you're in. I'ts just as simple as that.
But I would keep in mind that he doesn't hold back whatsoever and speaks his mind no matter what ssssoooo...
If you suck he won't hesitate to tear you into a new one!
All those followers you got on Soundcloud might just leave! *giggles*
Pfft, as if I'd fail. I know for a FACT I don't suck!

line.format: A l l e g e d l y .

dialogue.line: I'm gonna blow his dusty old ass off the stage! And straight into next week... or the next 5 weeks. I don't know for sure.
BUT I will surpass your father and become the greatest rapper this city has ever seen!
Confident huh? Well, before you get wrecked, how about we warm up a little first?
Hell yeah! Now you're talking my language. This party's gettin crazy! Let's rock!
